description: Guides users through multi-step workflows: promotion lifecycle, scenario planning, approvals, and status tracking.

workflow_template_id.title: Workflow Template ID
workflow_template_id.description: ID of the entity workflow template this agent navigates.

auto_advance.title: Auto-Advance on Approval
auto_advance.description: Automatically advance to the next step when the current step is approved.

notification_channel.description: How users are notified of workflow events.
